articles.author: Stevie Bonifield
articles.title: Artemis II astronauts break a record, name a crater - theverge.com
articles.description: After breaking Apollo 13’s distance record on Monday, the crew of Artemis II proposed names for two Moon craters, including one named after a lost loved one.
articles.content: The crew proposed naming a bright spot on the Moon after commander Reid Wisemans late wife, Carroll. The crew proposed naming a bright spot on the Moon after co… [+2262 chars]
